ab: Huya su msa musa biyi?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Mgriq ku tdruy qapi musa biyi.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Huya msa musa spuhan ka hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Mksa musa spuhan ka hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Huya su msa musa Pung Hug?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Peapa ku asu skaya musa Pung Hug.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Huya su msa musa Pung Hug?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Peapa ku asu musa Pung Hug.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Huya su msa musa sapah?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Peapa ku tdruy gmtuq elug ka musa sapah.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Peapa manu musa ptasan ka Rabay?
en: How does Rabay go to school?

ab: Peapa tdruy qrngul musa ptasan ka Rabay.
en: Rabay goes to school by train.

ab: Peapa manu musa pnrhulan ka Pisaw?
en: How does Pisaw go to church?

ab: Peapa tdruy gakat musa pnrhulan ka Pisaw.
en: Pisaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Peapa su tdruy gmtuq elug musa ptasan hug?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Aji, peapa ku tdruy bahu ka musa ptasan.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Peapa su tdruy gakat ka musa ptasan hug?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: kiya, peapa ku tdruy gakat ka musa ptasan.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Peapa su tdruy qrngul pstlaway musa Takaw hug?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Kiya, peapa ku tdruy qrngul pstlaway ka musa Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: Peapa su tdruy qrngul aji uri o peapa su asu skaya ka musa Taytung hug?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Peapa ku asu skaya, yaasa mslikaw bi ka asu skaya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: Peapa su tdruy bahu aji uri o mgriq su tdruy musa pnrhulan hug?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: Mgriq ku tdruy ka musa pnrhulan, yaasa slikaw bi dhuq ka tdruy.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Dalih sapah su ka sbrigan hug?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Aji dalih, mgriq ku tdruy pupuk gakat ka musa sbrigan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Dalih ptasan ka saan smku pila hug?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Dalih bi, mksa do dhuq da.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Dalih ppyaan tdruy ka uqan hug?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: Mlatat su ppyaan tdruy mksa su rima spngan tuki do dhuq da.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
